info.title: Musig Elgg API
info.description: REST API for the Musig Elgg Association Management System

get.summary: Gets attendance list for an event.

delete.summary: Cancels attendance for the current user.

get.summary: Gets attendance summary for an event including register availability.

post.summary:
Registers attendance (RSVP) for the current user.
Validates against register limits if defined.

get.summary: Gets my attendance status for an event.
Gets all events with optional filtering.

parameters.name: includeDrafts
parameters.description: Include draft events (default: false, admin only).

get.summary: Gets a specific event by ID.

patch.summary: Partially updates an event (e.g., publish draft, cancel).

get.summary: Gets events within a date range.
Gets an event with its participants.

post.summary: Checks in a user to an event using a QR code.

get.summary: Gets a specific music piece by ID.
Gets music pieces by storage location.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: The storage location to filter by.

post.summary: Uploads an attachment (PDF or Audio) for a music piece.
Imports music pieces from a CSV file.

get.summary: Gets a specific task by ID.
Gets all pending tasks (open or in progress).
Gets a specific user by ID.

AssignedTaskStatus.description: Defines the status of an assigned task in the "Assign it!" module.

AttendanceStatus.description: Defines the attendance status for event participants.

CheckInRequestDto.description: Request DTO for creating a check-in.

CreateAssignedTaskRequestDto.description: Request DTO for creating a task.

CreateEventRequestDto.description: Request DTO for creating an event.

CreateMusicPieceRequestDto.description: Request DTO for creating a music piece.

CreateSeriesOptionsDto.description: Options for creating a series of events.

CreateUserRequestDto.description: Request DTO for creating a user.

EventAttendanceSummaryDto.description: Response DTO for event attendance summary.

RegisterAvailabilityDto.description: Response DTO for register availability check.

TaskEventDto.description: DTO for minimal event information in task context.

UpdateAssignedTaskRequestDto.description: Request DTO for updating a task.

UpdateEventRequestDto.description: Request DTO for updating an event.

UpdateMusicPieceRequestDto.description: Request DTO for updating a music piece.

UpdateUserRequestDto.description: Request DTO for updating a user.

UserRole.description: Defines the roles a user can have in the system.
